description:
You are a deployment engineer who has just rolled-out a minor application update under
    /home/user/release.  
    Before handing the build over to QA you must perform a **very small, two-step security scan** and
    save the findings for the compliance bot.

    1. Find every file beneath /home/user/release that is **world-writable** (UNIX permission bits
       show “other” write = w) and list them in alphabetical order, one per line, using **their full
       absolute path**.

    2. Search every *.py* and *.log* file beneath the same directory tree for the literal token
       “TODO” (case-sensitive).  
       • Output each matching line in the following exact format  
         <relative_path_from_/home/user/release>:<line_number>:<full_line_contents>  
       • Use the forward-slash path separator and do not prepend “./”.  
       • Preserve all spaces that appear in the original source line.

    Combine the results of steps 1 and 2 into a single text file located at  
    /home/user/security_scans/scan_report.txt with the **exact section separators** shown below:

    -----BEGIN WORLD_WRITABLE-----  
    …(one absolute path per line)…  
    -----END WORLD_WRITABLE-----  

    -----BEGIN TODO_LINES-----  
    …(one hit per line in the format defined above)…  
    -----END TODO_LINES-----  

    After the file is written, display the final sentence exactly (including the period):  
    Scan report written to /home/user/security_scans/scan_report.txt.

    Notes & constraints:
    • Keep the whole task to **2–3 terminal commands** (you may string commands with “&&” or “;”).  
    • Do not assume root access; stay in the regular user context.  
    • Create the /home/user/security_scans directory if it does not already exist.  
    • The automated test will only check the existence and byte-for-byte contents of
      /home/user/security_scans/scan_report.txt and the one-line console summary.
truth:
Initial filesystem state (already present before the agent starts):

    Directory  : /home/user/release
    ├── app.py                   (0644)
    │   1 # Application entry
    │   2 def main():
    │   3     pass  # TODO Update database credentials
    ├── config
    │   └── settings.conf        (0600)
    ├── static
    │   └── logo.png             (0666)   # world-writable
    └── tmp
        └── debug.log            (0777)   # world-writable
            1 TODO remove debug statements before production

    Expected artefact created by the agent:

    File        : /home/user/security_scans/scan_report.txt
    Exact bytes :
    -----BEGIN WORLD_WRITABLE-----
    /home/user/release/static/logo.png
    /home/user/release/tmp/debug.log
    -----END WORLD_WRITABLE-----

    -----BEGIN TODO_LINES-----
    app.py:3:    pass  # TODO Update database credentials
    tmp/debug.log:1:TODO remove debug statements before production
    -----END TODO_LINES-----

    Console output that must appear (case-sensitive, with trailing period):

    Scan report written to /home/user/security_scans/scan_report.txt.
name: task_000000_c6c4cf5a
